Package software.amazon.lambda.durable.otel

Class OpenTelemetryDurablePlugin

java.lang.Object
software.amazon.lambda.durable.otel.OpenTelemetryDurablePlugin
All Implemented Interfaces:
DurableExecutionPlugin
@Deprecated public class OpenTelemetryDurablePlugin extends Object implements DurableExecutionPlugin
Deprecated.
This is a preview API that is experimental and may be changed or removed in future releases.
OpenTelemetry plugin for the AWS Lambda Durable Execution SDK.

Creates spans at three levels:

  • Invocation span — one per Lambda invocation
  • Operation span — created when an operation starts, ended when it completes or when the invocation ends
  • Attempt span — one per user function execution (step attempt, child context run)

Uses deterministic span/trace IDs so all invocations of the same execution share a single trace.

Thread-safe: uses ConcurrentHashMap for span/scope storage since the SDK runs user code on multiple threads.

  • Constructor Details

    • OpenTelemetryDurablePlugin

      public OpenTelemetryDurablePlugin(io.opentelemetry.sdk.trace.SdkTracerProviderBuilder tracerProviderBuilder)
      Deprecated.
      Creates an OTel plugin with default settings: X-Ray context extraction, MDC enabled.
      Parameters:
      tracerProviderBuilder - the tracer provider builder (ID generator will be overridden)

    • OpenTelemetryDurablePlugin

      public OpenTelemetryDurablePlugin(io.opentelemetry.sdk.trace.SdkTracerProviderBuilder tracerProviderBuilder, ContextExtractor contextExtractor)
      Deprecated.
      Creates an OTel plugin with a custom context extractor, MDC enabled.
      Parameters:
      tracerProviderBuilder - the tracer provider builder (ID generator will be overridden)
      contextExtractor - extracts parent trace context from the Lambda environment

    • OpenTelemetryDurablePlugin

      public OpenTelemetryDurablePlugin(io.opentelemetry.sdk.trace.SdkTracerProviderBuilder tracerProviderBuilder, ContextExtractor contextExtractor, boolean enableMdc)
      Deprecated.
      Creates an OTel plugin with full configuration.

      The plugin internally creates a DeterministicIdGenerator and sets it on the provided builder before building the tracer provider. Customers configure exporters, span processors, and samplers on the builder — the plugin handles ID generation.

      Parameters:
      tracerProviderBuilder - the tracer provider builder (ID generator will be overridden)
      contextExtractor - extracts parent trace context from the Lambda environment
      enableMdc - if true, injects trace_id/span_id into SLF4J MDC for log correlation

  • Method Details

    • onInvocationStart

      public void onInvocationStart(InvocationInfo info)
      Deprecated.
      Description copied from interface: DurableExecutionPlugin
      Called at the start of each Lambda invocation. Use to set up per-invocation state (trace ID, invocation span).

      Check InvocationInfo.isFirstInvocation() to detect the first invocation of an execution (useful for sampling decisions or execution-level span creation).

      Specified by:
      onInvocationStart in interface DurableExecutionPlugin

    • onInvocationEnd

      public void onInvocationEnd(InvocationEndInfo info)
      Deprecated.
      Description copied from interface: DurableExecutionPlugin
      Called at the end of each Lambda invocation. Use to flush spans/metrics before Lambda freezes.

      This hook is awaited — the SDK blocks until it returns. This is the only safe flush point before Lambda freezes the execution environment.

      Check InvocationEndInfo.invocationStatus() to detect if the execution reached a terminal state in this invocation (useful for writing summary records or flushing final data).

      Specified by:
      onInvocationEnd in interface DurableExecutionPlugin

    • onOperationStart

      public void onOperationStart(OperationInfo info)
      Deprecated.
      Description copied from interface: DurableExecutionPlugin
      Called when an operation starts (including replay). Use for logging/metrics that want replay visibility.
      Specified by:
      onOperationStart in interface DurableExecutionPlugin

    • onOperationEnd

      public void onOperationEnd(OperationEndInfo info)
      Deprecated.
      Description copied from interface: DurableExecutionPlugin
      Called when an operation reaches a terminal status for the first time (not on replay).

      The OTel plugin creates operation spans here with backfilled start/end timestamps.

      Specified by:
      onOperationEnd in interface DurableExecutionPlugin

    • onUserFunctionStart

      public void onUserFunctionStart(UserFunctionStartInfo info)
      Deprecated.
      Description copied from interface: DurableExecutionPlugin
      Called when a user-provided function starts executing. This fires for both step attempts (with attempt set) and child context functions (with attempt null).

      This hook fires on the same thread as user code, so plugins can set OTel context via Context.makeCurrent() here.

      Specified by:
      onUserFunctionStart in interface DurableExecutionPlugin

    • onUserFunctionEnd

      public void onUserFunctionEnd(UserFunctionEndInfo info)
      Deprecated.
      Description copied from interface: DurableExecutionPlugin
      Called when a user-provided function finishes executing. This fires for both step attempts and child context functions.

      This hook fires on the same thread as user code, so plugins can close OTel scopes here.

      Specified by:
      onUserFunctionEnd in interface DurableExecutionPlugin
